context.projectOverview: agent-bober — multi-agent autonomous build harness (TS, ESM, Vitest, better-sqlite3 for state). Phase B of the heterogeneous multi-provider agent team: give fleet children a bounded inter-agent exchange via one shared WAL facts.db. This sprint builds ONLY the SharedBlackboard wrapper + an opt-in WAL option on FactStore — no coordinator/CLI/config wiring (those are Sprints 2-4).

completedSprints.contractId: spec-20260618-fleet-tier-provider-routing (Phase A, separate spec, all 3 sprints)
completedSprints.title: Tier-by-difficulty provider routing + Grok/xAI provider + ToolRoleGuard
completedSprints.summary: Phase A is complete and on this same branch (bober/medical-team). Phase B is additive to it: omitting --blackboard must keep fleet byte-identical to Phase A.

relevantFiles: src/state/facts.ts (READ IN FULL — constructor, insertFact, getActiveFacts, FactInput/FactRecord, factsDbPath/memoryDir)
src/fleet/ (where shared-blackboard.ts goes; observe existing fleet module conventions)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md — ESM with .js import extensions, import type, Zod for config, no SDK leak, node:fs/promises only (no sync fs), unicode section headers, conventional commits 'bober(sprint-1): ...', collocated *.test.ts, no fs mocks (use tmp dirs).
